name: cc-plugins
description: Claude Code Plugins for workflow automation with Git, Jira, Dev, and environment setup skills

plugins.name: claude
plugins.description: Claude Development Plugin That Can Create Commands, Scripts, and Hooks for Claude Code

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Comprehensive Git Development Workflows Specializing in Git Operations

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: Jira Cloud REST API v3 CLI and shell library - issue CRUD, JQL search, transitions, sprint management, and ADF builders

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Autonomous development workflows - auto-dev iterative fix loop and auto-research experimentation

plugins.name: setup
plugins.description: macOS dev environment bootstrap — Homebrew, Zsh (uv/fnm/Go), Neovim, tmux, Git+gh, Ghostty, Docker (OrbStack), Hysteria2 proxy, system prefs. Modular, multi-select.

plugins.name: go-dev
plugins.description: Go development toolkit — 6 subagents (structure / bug / security reviewers + idiomatic / perf / test developers) plus a 4-phase go-optimize pipeline

plugins.name: video-downloader
plugins.description: Download videos from YouTube and other sites using yt-dlp with quality selection, subtitles, and format options
